title: Datuk Wira Mahadi bin Badrul Zaman (Mahadi) — Criminal Prosecution (2026)
text:
Nature of offence: Carrying on a business in a regulated activity without holding a Capital Markets Services Licence (CMSL) or being a registered person.

Offender(s): Datuk Wira Mahadi bin Badrul Zaman (Mahadi)

Facts: Mahadi was charged one (1) charge under section 58(1) read together with section 367(1) of the Capital Markets and Services Act 2007 (" CMSA ") in relation to AUF MBZ Consortium PLT's (" AUF MBZ ") conduct of carrying on a business in the regulated activity of dealing in securities without holding a CMSL or being a registered person for dealing in securities. 
 Pursuant to section 367(1) CMSA, Mahadi in his capacity as AUF MBZ's representative at the material time, is deemed to have committed the offence under section 58(1) CMSA, which occurred between 3 September 2021 to 15 February 2024 in Selangor.

Outcome: Mahadi was charged in the Kuala Lumpur Sessions Court on 23 February 2026.
